---
name: Proposal
about: Propose an architectural, normative, governance, registry, schema, or implementation change
title: "[PROPOSAL] "
labels: proposal
assignees: ""
---

# AISET Proposal

## Summary

Provide a concise description of the proposal.

## Problem

Describe the problem or limitation being addressed.

## Proposed Change

Describe the proposed change in sufficient detail.

## Contribution Type

Select or describe the contribution type:

- architectural;
- normative;
- governance;
- publication;
- specification;
- schema;
- registry;
- implementation;
- terminology;
- process;
- other.

## Scope

Identify the affected documents, specifications, directories, identifiers, or implementations.

## Technology Independence

Explain whether the proposal remains independent of specific vendors, models, runtimes, programming languages, or implementation frameworks.

## Normative Impact

State whether the proposal changes normative requirements.

If yes, identify the affected requirements, invariants, interfaces, validation conditions, or conformance rules.

## Compatibility Impact

Describe any compatibility implications.

## Interoperability Impact

Describe any interoperability implications.

## Security and Privacy Considerations

Describe relevant security, privacy, trust, provenance, or abuse considerations.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe reasonable alternatives and why they were not selected.

## Migration or Transition

Describe any migration, deprecation, supersession, or transition requirements.

## Validation

Explain how the proposal could be tested, reviewed, measured, or validated.

## Related Material

Provide links or references to related publications, issues, specifications, registry records, or prior discussions.
